title: Implement bounded TX/forwarding queues with backpressure
description: Prevent LoRa bufferbloat: (1) Bounded TX queue (~4-8 packets), (2) Bounded forwarding buffer per-source, (3) Backpressure error to app when queue full, (4) Deadline-based expiry (drop packets older than ~10s), (5) Priority: routing control > ACKs > app data. CoDel-style AQM may be overkill but consider timestamp-based dropping.
close_reason: Verified complete: (1) TX Queue - C impl in lichen/subsys/lichen/link/tx_queue.c with 4-packet bound, 4 priority levels, deadline expiry, backpressure (-ENOBUFS), 17/17 tests pass; Python impl in python/src/lichen/link/tx_queue.py with same features + EMA latency, 32 tests pass. (2) Forwarding Buffer - C impl in lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/router.c with per-source limits (2 pkts/source, 8 sources max), LRU eviction, deadline expiry, backpressure; Python impl in ForwardingBuffer class, 12 tests pass. Spec doc: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md. No additional work needed.
